name: esp_lcd_axs15231b
description: Waveshare ESP-IDF esp_lcd driver for AXS15231B QSPI panel + integrated touch (vendored from waveshareteam/ESP32-S3-Touch-LCD-3.49 Examples/Arduino/09_LVGL_V8_Test/src). Used by env waveshare_lcd_349_smoketest because Arduino_GFX's AXS15231B init bytes are incompatible with this panel revision.
